terms.name: Workspace
terms.definition: Real-time operational home adapted to role, mission, and context

terms.name: Living Workspace
terms.definition: Dynamically generated interface based on current Human context

terms.name: Context Engine
terms.definition: Continuous understanding of mission, meeting, team, and workload

terms.name: Adaptive Dashboard
terms.definition: Home page answering what requires attention now

terms.name: Universal Navigation
terms.definition: Consistent navigation philosophy across all institutions

terms.name: Command Palette
terms.definition: Keyboard-first unified command interface

terms.name: Universal Search
terms.definition: Permission-respecting search across all institutional domains

terms.name: AI Command Center
terms.definition: Always-available advisory AI with explained sources

terms.name: Activity Stream
terms.definition: Relevance-filtered view of assigned and institutional activity

terms.name: Smart Notifications
terms.definition: Intelligently grouped notifications minimizing fatigue

terms.name: Adaptive Cards
terms.definition: Context-relevant dashboard cards

terms.name: Role Awareness
terms.definition: Interface adapts to volunteer, executive, instructor roles automatically

terms.name: Device Adaptation
terms.definition: Optimized presentation for phone through command center displays

terms.name: Accessibility First
terms.definition: Keyboard, screen reader, and contrast support in every screen

terms.name: Conversational Spanish
terms.definition: Human-reviewed governance translations, never machine-feel

terms.name: Experience Memory
terms.definition: Human-owned workspace preferences and recent activity

terms.name: Institutional Personalization
terms.definition: Brand, theme, and terminology without changing navigation

terms.name: Offline Workspace
terms.definition: Mission execution and knowledge access without connectivity

terms.name: Federation Experience
terms.definition: Seamless institution switching with canonical identity

terms.name: Experience Analytics
terms.definition: Interface improvement metrics—not Human evaluation
